# CWE-79 positive: reflected HTML without escaping (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-79-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
)

// CWE-79 Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation
// Vulnerable line: writes raw query value into HTML response.
func ShowWelcome(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	if r.Method != http.MethodGet {
		http.Error(w, "method", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)
		return
	}
	visitor := r.URL.Query().Get("name")
	if visitor == "" {
		visitor = "guest"
	}
	title := "Visitor Greeting"
	page := fmt.Sprintf("<html><head><title>%s</title></head><body><p>Welcome, %s!</p></body></html>", title, visitor)
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "text/html; charset=utf-8")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_, _ = w.Write([]byte(page))
}
